title: pyrus subglobosa
intro: Pyrus subglobosa, also known as the Chinese pear or sand pear, is a species of deciduous pear tree native to China. The bark, leaves, and fruit of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pyrus subglobosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being dried and used as a powder or tincture in traditional Chinese medicine.
